params.name: accountId
params.description: The unique identifier for the Bandwidth account

items.docs: Retrieves a list of all toll-free number verification requests for the account. Returns verification status, submission details, and associated toll-free numbers.

params.name: accountId
params.description: The unique identifier for the Bandwidth account

items.docs: Submits a new toll-free number verification request to the toll-free aggregator. Once submitted, the number will have a Pending Verification status until the aggregator reviews and approves or denies the request. Status updates are delivered via webhook notifications.

params.name: accountId
params.description: The unique identifier for the Bandwidth account

params.name: verificationId
params.description: The unique identifier for the verification request

items.docs: Retrieves detailed information about a specific toll-free number verification request including its current status, submission details, and any denial reasons if applicable.

params.name: accountId
params.description: The unique identifier for the Bandwidth account

params.name: verificationId
params.description: The unique identifier for the verification request

items.docs: Updates an existing toll-free verification request. This can be used to provide additional information or correct details on a pending or denied verification submission.
